problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
hypothesis: Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces may resolve How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
